title: The Deep Sea Becomes Dangerous
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Franky, Rayleigh, Narrator, Marines, Coribou, Nami. The core story beat is the deep sea becomes dangerous.
scene: The scene centers on the deep sea becomes dangerous, with Unknown person #1, Franky, Rayleigh, Narrator, Marines, Coribou, Nami driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mission...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Complete...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: There wasn't a single scratch on the sunny.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: And when I asked Rayleigh about it afterwards...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...he told me what Kuma had told him in the middle of that battle back then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am one of the leading members of the revolutionary army.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have my reasons for wishing to help this crew escape this place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think you may all have realised this to an extent...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but that man saved our lives back there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And after we had vanished from the island...

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: ...Kuma- San visited Rayleigh with more to tell.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I do not have much time left.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know why he had to submit to this...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: ...but the Marines had been modifying him bit by bit, as an "experimental subject" changing his body more and more into a cyborg.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had agreed to have his personality completely erased by the time of the ultimate war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but then...!! He couldn't possibly have known what we would do after he'd sent us off to all those different places!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did he wait with the ship despite that?! Even though his personality was gone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man responsible for his "restructuring", Dr. vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...had allowed him to include a single mission of his own in the programming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to "protect the ship of the straw hat pirates until the day one of their members returns".

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: That's why for the past two years, despite having none of his original memories... he's been following the orders of his former self, waiting until the day we came back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's just completely screwed up... why would he go so far for us...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we think about his connection to the Revolution- Tionaries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...the only thing I can think of is Luffy's dad, since he's the leader of the revolutionary army.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't really know much about my dad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But that bear-guy was a good guy after all, huh...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like in the end, we've only been able to spend these two valuable years apart...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...because that man chose to fight in our stead...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't see any way for us to find out what he was truly thinking at this point...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but hold that knowledge in your hearts. When it comes down to it, Bartholomew Kuma...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...is the Saviour of our crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And if we ever do run into him again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...it'll be as a heartless human weapon...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm grateful, but I can't say I understand... I hope we find out the truth of this some day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's all I wanted to say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah! Sanji, you're awake...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here, have some food! Straight from the Isle of Women!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: The Isle of Women...?! are you sure this Kuma guy is some kind of Saviour...?! Do you have any idea where I've been for the past two years?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell kind of training have you been doing, Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, now, Sanji-san... Would you care for a song?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't try to comfort me!! That'll get me really depressed!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: Big bro dude!! There they are!! Up ahead!! The straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can see that for myself, idiot!! Honestly, how stupid can you be?!!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Keheheheheheheheheheheh... this time, your ship really will be mine!!!

summary: The Deep Sea Becomes Dangerous. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
